{{Quote|We've lost General Kenobi's trail, sir, as well as contact with Prowlers numbered one through fourteen. Permission to deploy our final batch?|CT-307 to his commander|<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />}}
'''CT-307''' was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone trooper]] who fought in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]].<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" /> CT-307 was created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] by the [[Kaminoan/Legends|Kaminoans]]. Developed from the [[Clone template/Legends|genetic template]] of [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], CT-307 was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] who had [[Color/Legends|tan]] skin and a height of 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]].<ref name="Clone Databank" />

In [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]],<ref name="Date">''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates the [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]] to [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]].</ref> CT-307 served during the [[Battle of Utapau/Legends|Battle of Utapau]] in the [[212th Attack Battalion/Legends|212th Attack Battalion]] led by [[Clone Commander/Legends|clone commander]] [[Cody/Legends|Cody]] and [[Jedi General/Legends|Jedi General]] [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]. After the failed execution of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />—an [[Contingency Orders for the Grand Army of the Republic: Order Initiation, Orders 1 Through 150|order]] that declared the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] enemies of the Republic<ref name="RotS">{{Film|III}}</ref>—against Kenobi, [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] Cody dispatched several [[Prowler 1000 seeker droid/Legends|Prowler 1000 exploration droids]] to search for the [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi]]. During the search, the Prowlers encountered a [[Parent/Legends|mother]] [[Nos monster/Legends|nos monster]] who swallowed the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] whole after they approached too close to her babies. CT-307 reported the loss of Prowlers one through fourteen to his [[Commanding officer/Legends|commander]] and asked for permission to deploy the final batch.<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />

==Behind the scenes==
CT-307 was mentioned in the reference book ''[[The New Essential Guide to Droids]]'', as part of the ''[[Star Wars: Essential Guides]]'' series. The reference book was written by [[Daniel Wallace]] and released in [[2006]].<ref name="The New Essential Guide to Droids" />
